programme.title: Midsomer Murders 10
programme.desc: The action of the series takes place in England, in the area known as Midsomer.Among the eccentric inhabitants of one of the local towns there are Chief Inspector Tom Barnaby (John Nettles), husband Joyce (Jane Wymark) and father Cully (Laura Howard), who are calm and composed in tracking down crimes.He is assisted by his junior assistant, Sergeant Gavin Troy (Daniel Casey).Detectives work together to solve complex murder cases taking place in various nearby towns.The creators of the series were inspired by a series of books by the English writer Caroline Graham.In the seventh series, instead of Troy, Tom's new partner becomes Sergeant Dan Scott (John Hopkins), and in the ninth series - Sergeant Ben Jones (Jason Hughes).

credits.actor: Joyce Barnaby, żona Toma - Jane Wymark
sierżant Ben Jones, partner Barnaby'ego - Jason Hughes

programme.title: The Outlaws
programme.desc: Frank Sheldon, Gregory Dillard and the remaining convicts still have to complete their sentences in the form of community service.Unfortunately, all seven quickly discover that the criminal underground has not forgotten about them.

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: France, World War II.The owner of a charming cafe, René Artois (Gordon Kaye), experiences further funny adventures among his friends and Nazi officials tracking the resistance movement.

credits.actor: pułkownik Kurt von Strohm - Richard Marner
Madame Fanny La Fan/Leclerc - Rose Hill

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries 2
programme.desc: War veteran Dr. Lucien Blake (played by Craig McLachlan) returns to his hometown.He begins to support the local police in solving crimes.

credits.actor: Chief Supt Matthew Lawson - Joel Tobeck

programme.title: My Life is Murder 2
programme.desc: The second season of the series.Alexa Crowe (Lucy Lawless) supports the charismatic Inspector Harry (Rawiri Jobe) and his partner Madison (Ebony Vagulans) in solving difficult crimes.

credits.actor: Detective Inspector Kieran Hussey - Bernard Curry

programme.title: My Life is Murder 2
programme.desc: The second season of the series.Alexa Crowe (Lucy Lawless) supports the charismatic Inspector Harry (Rawiri Jobe) and his partner Madison (Ebony Vagulans) in solving difficult crimes.

credits.actor: Detective Inspector Kieran Hussey - Bernard Curry
Chief Superintendent Jean Innocent - Rebecca Front

programme.title: Father Brown 9
programme.desc: Another season of the series in which the charismatic priest, Father Brown (Mark Williams), investigates various criminal mysteries.They take place in the parish of Kembleford.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The next fate of the British commissioner, Richard Poole (Ben Miller).The officer is sent to one of the Caribbean islands, where he works to investigate the circumstances of local murders.

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries 2
programme.desc: War veteran Dr. Lucien Blake (played by Craig McLachlan) returns to his hometown.He begins to support the local police in solving crimes.

credits.actor: Chief Supt Matthew Lawson - Joel Tobeck

programme.title: London Kills
programme.desc: The fate of officers from the elite London unit.Investigators begin an investigation into the discovered bodies.They then investigate the death of a man who was killed during a bachelor party.

programme.title: London Kills
programme.desc: The fate of officers from the elite London unit.Investigators begin an investigation into the discovered bodies.They then investigate the death of a man who was killed during a bachelor party.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The further fate of Father Brown, who solves subsequent puzzles using his innate intuition and acquired psychological knowledge.In his work, he uses the experience gained over many years of service.

credits.actor: Chief Superintendent Jean Innocent - Rebecca Front

programme.title: My Life is Murder 2
programme.desc: The second season of the series.Alexa Crowe (Lucy Lawless) supports the charismatic Inspector Harry (Rawiri Jobe) and his partner Madison (Ebony Vagulans) in solving difficult crimes.

credits.actor: Detective Inspector Kieran Hussey - Bernard Curry

programme.title: Midsomer Murders 10
programme.desc: The action of the series takes place in England, in the area known as Midsomer.Among the eccentric inhabitants of one of the local towns there are Chief Inspector Tom Barnaby (John Nettles), husband Joyce (Jane Wymark) and father Cully (Laura Howard), who are calm and composed in tracking down crimes.He is assisted by his junior assistant, Sergeant Gavin Troy (Daniel Casey).Detectives work together to solve complex murder cases taking place in various nearby towns.The creators of the series were inspired by a series of books by the English writer Caroline Graham.In the seventh series, instead of Troy, Tom's new partner becomes Sergeant Dan Scott (John Hopkins), and in the ninth series - Sergeant Ben Jones (Jason Hughes).

credits.actor: Joyce Barnaby, żona Toma - Jane Wymark
sierżant Ben Jones, partner Barnaby'ego - Jason Hughes

programme.title: Midsomer Murders 10
programme.desc: The action of the series takes place in England, in the area known as Midsomer.Among the eccentric inhabitants of one of the local towns there are Chief Inspector Tom Barnaby (John Nettles), husband Joyce (Jane Wymark) and father Cully (Laura Howard), who are calm and composed in tracking down crimes.He is assisted by his junior assistant, Sergeant Gavin Troy (Daniel Casey).Detectives work together to solve complex murder cases taking place in various nearby towns.The creators of the series were inspired by a series of books by the English writer Caroline Graham.In the seventh series, instead of Troy, Tom's new partner becomes Sergeant Dan Scott (John Hopkins), and in the ninth series - Sergeant Ben Jones (Jason Hughes).

credits.actor: Joyce Barnaby, żona Toma - Jane Wymark
sierżant Ben Jones, partner Barnaby'ego - Jason Hughes

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The next fate of the British commissioner, Richard Poole (Ben Miller).The officer is sent to one of the Caribbean islands, where he works to investigate the circumstances of local murders.

programme.title: Ludwig
programme.desc: John 'Ludwig' Taylor lives in solitude, devoting himself to creating puzzles.His twin brother, Chief Inspector James Taylor, disappears.Taylor decides to find him and takes over his identity to do so.

credits.actor: Young John u0026 James Taylor - Jakub Bednarczyk

programme.title: Blue Lights
programme.desc: Young policemen start working at a police station in Belfast.They immediately face difficult tasks, as they fight drug-trafficking gangs, paramilitary organizations, secret agents and representatives of the local community who do not intend to comply.Officers are on the front line.They come into contact with people from different backgrounds - they have made bad decisions or are completely lost.For most of them, law enforcement officers primarily provide advice on how to get back on track.Meanwhile, the attention of the new employees is drawn to the sudden lull in the investigation conducted on many fronts into a local criminal group.

programme.title: Blue Lights
programme.desc: Young policemen start working at a police station in Belfast.They immediately face difficult tasks, as they fight drug-trafficking gangs, paramilitary organizations, secret agents and representatives of the local community who do not intend to comply.Officers are on the front line.They come into contact with people from different backgrounds - they have made bad decisions or are completely lost.For most of them, law enforcement officers primarily provide advice on how to get back on track.Meanwhile, the attention of the new employees is drawn to the sudden lull in the investigation conducted on many fronts into a local criminal group.

programme.desc: The third installment of the series.Alexa Crowe (Lucy Lawless) supports the charismatic Inspector Harry (Rawiri Jobe) and his partner Madison (Ebony Vagulans) in solving difficult crimes.

credits.actor: Detective Inspector Kieran Hussey - Bernard Curry

programme.title: Midsomer Murders 10
programme.desc: The action of the series takes place in England, in the area known as Midsomer.Among the eccentric inhabitants of one of the local towns there are Chief Inspector Tom Barnaby (John Nettles), husband Joyce (Jane Wymark) and father Cully (Laura Howard), who are calm and composed in tracking down crimes.He is assisted by his junior assistant, Sergeant Gavin Troy (Daniel Casey).Detectives work together to solve complex murder cases taking place in various nearby towns.The creators of the series were inspired by a series of books by the English writer Caroline Graham.In the seventh series, instead of Troy, Tom's new partner becomes Sergeant Dan Scott (John Hopkins), and in the ninth series - Sergeant Ben Jones (Jason Hughes).

programme.title: The Outlaws
programme.desc: Frank Sheldon, Gregory Dillard and the remaining convicts still have to complete their sentences in the form of community service.Unfortunately, all seven quickly discover that the criminal underground has not forgotten about them.

programme.title: My Family 3
programme.desc: Ben (Robert Lindsay) and Susan (Zoë Wanamaker) Harper are a middle-class couple living in the Chiswick district of London.Their three children live with them: Nick (Kris Marshall), Janey (Daniela Denby-Ashe) and Michael (Gabriel Thomson).Ben is a dentist who values ​​peace and quiet.Susan makes all the important decisions in the family.She works in London as a tour guide and has a hard time adapting to the stereotype of a woman cooking dinner for her husband.The eldest son, Nick, is not very bright, has problems finding a permanent job and spends most of his time in front of the TV.Janey is only interested in clothes and boys, and the youngest, Michael, is an intelligent boy and the mascot of the whole family.He doesn't find a common language with his father, but spends all day in front of the computer.

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries 2
programme.desc: War veteran Dr. Lucien Blake (played by Craig McLachlan) returns to his hometown.He begins to support the local police in solving crimes.

credits.actor: Chief Supt Matthew Lawson - Joel Tobeck
